# v0.3 design samples

These screenshots were generated by rendering the canonical skeletons
in `../assets.css`, `../index.html`, and `../bug.html` against a
hand-built fixture, then opening the result in Chrome at the listed
viewport. They are reference artifacts for the
[`html-report-style-guide.md`](../../../html-report-style-guide.md).

| File | What | Viewport |
|------|------|----------|
| `dashboard-desktop.png` | Dashboard at desktop width — verdict hero, filter bar, three priority-sorted bug lists, recent runs list | 1280 × 1800 |
| `dashboard-mobile.png`  | Dashboard at phone width — single column, sticky thumb-zone action at the bottom | 390 × 2200 |
| `bug-detail-desktop.png` | Bug detail at desktop — eyebrow, title, deck, impact pull-quote, what-happening / what-should, risk-to-fix aside, steps, evidence, triage log, right-rail metadata | 1280 × 2400 |

Re-render by:

1. Copy the four files from `..` into a `docs/qa/report/` folder.
2. Substitute the `{{TOKEN}}` placeholders with sample content
   (see the source in this commit's `samples/` README for a fixture).
3. Open `index.html` in any browser.
